generated_oml:
// Sensing Components
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor providing raw point clouds for vehicle perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTrans
]

instance DepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera providing RGB‑depth frames for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthRGBDepthFrameTrans
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor sampled from Jetson Orin Nano sensor interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedTrans
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor sampled from Jetson Orin Nano sensor interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTrans
]

// Physical‑to‑Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudTrans : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance DepthRGBDepthFrameTrans : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedTrans : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTrans : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// Models/Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data after type‑aligning and unit conversion processed by Data Translation FE"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTrans
]

instance DepthRGBDepthFrameData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB‑depth frames after processing, used for object clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthRGBDepthFrameTrans
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data, time‑stamped and synchronized for ACC decision making"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedTrans
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data, used to evaluate vehicle heading and ACC performance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTrans
]

// Enablers
instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Front‑end handling serialization, type alignment, and unit conversion for all incoming streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for delivering type‑aligned data to further processing stages"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationInsight
]

instance DataTranslationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation that sensor data have been successfully serialized and unit‑converted"
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Collects processed point clouds, vehicle state, and object tracks for storage and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates raw telemetry into structured telemetry log entries"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataCollectionInsight
]

instance DataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming that vehicle state and perceived environment are captured accurately"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides 3D visualization and control panel UI for operators"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContextualInsight
]

instance ContextualInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time contextual visualization of vehicle dynamics and surrounding objects"
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates time‑series reports and performance metrics like ACC accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceInsight
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on performance trends, e.g., ACC accuracy over time"
]

instance AccControlFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Front‑end implementing ISO15622 ACC strategy based on vehicle state and perception data"
    DTDFVocab:enables AccControlService
]

instance AccControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Handles decision making for desired speed, emergency braking, and control parameter tuning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, TuneControlParameterAction
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed setpoint for the ACC subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking based on proximity and ACC algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TuneControlParameterAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manually tune ACC control parameters through remote management UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Issues throttle and steering commands to the physical twin via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller and steering servo"
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes actuation commands received from AccControlService on the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThrottleCommandAction, SteeringCommandAction
]

instance ThrottleCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to set motor voltage for vehicle propulsion"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SteeringCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to set steering servo position"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LiDARSensor, DepthCameraSensor, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
              LiDARPointCloudTrans, DepthRGBDepthFrameTrans, VehicleSpeedTrans, SteeringAngleTrans,
              LiDARPointCloudData, DepthRGBDepthFrameData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData,
              DataTranslationFE, DataProcessingService, DataCollectionFE, DataCollectionService,
              RealTimeVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService, AccControlFE, AccControlService,
              ActuationFE, ActuationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends ACC outputs and remote management commands back to the vehicle over Wi‑Fi. The Virtual‑to‑Physical FE transmits desired speed, enable/disable ACC flags, desired‑speed modifiers, and emergency‑braking commands. These are received by the Physical Twin Entity on the Jetson Orin Nano which actuates the vehicle via the ESC and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All services operate in real‑time with an end‑to‑end latency requirement of ≤100 ms; all clocks are synchronized within 100 ms to ensure event ordering and timing consistency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "DT’s overall architecture follows the ISO 23247 entity‑based reference: Physical Twin Entity (carrying raw data and actuation), Digital Twin Entity (housing analysis, ACC control, data collection), User Entity (UI and remote commands), and Cross‑System Entity (data translation). ROS2 packages implement each Functional Entity; the Data Translation FE serializes and aligns messages; all entities are connected through a Wi‑Fi network and ROS2 DDS topics, orchestrating data flow from PT to DT and back."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (requirements R1–R8), architecture mapping to ISO 23247 RA, implementation as ROS2 nodes, validation against latency and functional requirements, deployment, and ongoing operation/telemetry; future upgrades are noted but not detailed."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity is ensured by maintaining 100 ms latency and 100 ms clock sync, allowing real‑time ACC execution. Validity of the ACC model is benchmarked against ISO 15622 behavior; data collection components are verified via on‑board monitoring and explicit reporting to operators. Uncertainty in LiDAR clustering is reduced by DBSCAN and Kalman filter; however, the paper acknowledges limitations in control fidelity at high‑speed scenarios since the PT is a 1/10‑scale prototype."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra‑entity communication uses ROS2 publish/subscribe over TCP‑ROS or UDP; inter‑entity communication between vehicle and DT occurs over a Wi‑Fi link, with Data Translation FE performing serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment; the connection is identified as a wireless V2X‑like 802.11n network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Distributed deployment: on‑board components (Physical Twin Entity, part of Digital Twin Entity) run on the Jetson Orin Nano; off‑load processing and user interfaces run on a remote edge or cloud server accessed over Wi‑Fi. The hosting infrastructure uses ROS2 deployment via containers or native binaries and an external SQL database for persistent storage."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) defines the reference architecture and entity composition; ISO 15622 specifies the adaptive cruise control algorithm; ROS2 (DDS) provides middleware standard; optional OPC UA was mentioned as an alternative communication layer."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system operates in a safety‑critical automotive context. Real‑time latency ≤ 100 ms and 100 ms clock synchronization support timely emergency braking. The ACC design follows ISO 15622, ensuring acceptable decision logic. The DT’s remote command channel is initiated over Wi‑Fi but explicit cybersecurity measures (e.g., authentication, encryption) are not described in the document."
]
